title: DOM Based Cross Site Scripting (XSS) - CrowdStream - Bugcrowd
how_to_find: DOM Based Cross Site Scripting (XSS) - CrowdStream - Bugcrowd
payloads_or_poc: DOM-Based XSS is a type of web security vulnerability that exploits the Document Object Model (DOM) of a web page to inject and execute malicious JavaScript code in the victim's browser. Unlike other XSS vulnerabilities,…
Enter the payload in the 'School' field: <script>alert('XSS')</script>.

summary.vuln_point: DOM-based XSS: client-side data reaches a dangerous sink (e.g., innerHTML) without sanitization.
poc: DOM-Based XSS is a type of web security vulnerability that exploits the Document Object Model (DOM) of a web page to inject and execute malicious JavaScript code in the victim's browser. Unlike other XSS vulnerabilities,…

summary.impact: Arbitrary JavaScript execution in victim browsers; can lead to account takeover actions depending on context.
